name: Prompt Submission Request
about: Submit a new AI coding prompt to the repository
title: '[PROMPT] '
labels: 'prompt, needs-review'
assignees: ''

---

## Tool/Platform
(e.g., Cursor, Trae, Copilot, etc.)


## Prompt Purpose
Describe what this prompt achieves succinctly.

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] This prompt solves a real-world software engineering problem.
- [ ] It consistently outputs a quality of 9/10 or better in your tests.
- [ ] You have run `python validation/token-counter.py <file>` and added the prompt to `prompts.json`.
- [ ] It does *not* contain vague "do everything" instructions, but rather structured directives.
- [ ] The prompt is placed in the correct `prompts/<tool>/` folder.

## Raw Output Example (Optional)
Attach a snippet or link to a gist showing what this prompt successfully generated.
